subcodes.title: Instructions to Mrs. Thornburg Cropper ca. 1900
subcodes.first_line: All prophets are messengers from God and all ways lead to Him and all have borne fruit. The great gift is unselfishness, and the loving wish to help others will guide us.
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @oneness; unity of religion, @progressive revelation; renewal of religion, @knowledge; recognition of God, @spiritual transformation, @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow, @service to others; to the Cause of God
